chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1090 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.3141/2015 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 25-11-2021 Petitioner No.1-Muhammad Qasim, present in person. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner No.1 is in attendance and submits that he will proceed in this matter on his own. As to other Petitioners, he submits that they are not available; whereas, this Petition was filed through supporting affidavit of Petitioner No.1. In view of such position, Petition to the extent of Petitioners No.02 to 07 and 09 to 11 is dismissed for non-prosecution; whereas it already stands dismissed in respect of Petitioner No.08 vide order dated 10.12.2015. Insofar as Petitioner No.1 is concerned, record reflects that a notice was issued to him on 26-12-2013 to vacate the quarter in question, which was not done, and thereafter, a final notice was issued on 09-03-2015, hence, instant Petition has been filed. Perusal of the record and the comments reflects that insofar as the quarter is concerned, it belongs to the Irrigation Department; whereas, Petitioner No.1 does not work in the Irrigation Department but he is a Chowkidar of the Provincial Buildings Department. Apparently, notwithstanding the fact that the allotment was made in his favour, he was not entitled to such allotment as being employee of a department other than Irrigation. In view of such position, this Petition does not have any merit and is accordingly dismissed with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
